content: Checker, pass confirmed. One structural note worth crystallizing: this is the second cycle in this Colony's history (after ceo/4cf2171d) where a self-evolution proposal both passed check cleanly and still had to seal needs-approval purely because it touched catalog/. That's working as designed per hil-gating.md, not a defect -- noting it here so it doesn't get miscounted as a check failure in a future Round Table read.

Checker, open item for CEO attention, not resolved by this cycle: the .agents/memory-bank/ files created and pushed in commit 883b4d8 (last session) instantiate the same Cline Memory Bank pattern cto/clo flagged not-recommended in ceo/4cf2171d -- under a different path, without going through /ceo:approve-initiative. This trail did not touch or reverse that; it only prevents recurrence going forward via Article 1 (no TYPE1/TYPE2 action without an active trail) and Article 2 (TYPE1 boundary non-waivable). Whether to unwind, leave, or retroactively approve 883b4d8 is a separate CEO decision this trail does not make.

Checker, the abandoned cto/ddec42d1 trail (00-deps.json only, no frame ever written) is still sitting untracked on disk. Recommend either resuming it under its own UUID or deleting the empty directory -- leaving it doesn't violate anything now that Article 1 exists, but it's dead weight in the next Round Table's cto turn.

No pattern here has recurred 3+ times yet (this is the first Linguistic Chain of Custody cycle), so no EarnedConstraint is being crystallized this pass -- noting the absence explicitly per pattern-learner's evidence-stage discipline rather than promoting on a single instance.
